memoryArtifacts.headline: Omerod. The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester, Vol II, Page 649
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 649, Vol II.
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.
In 3 Volumes, Volume II,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.Bulkeley, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾布爾可勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William Bulkeley於1240年出生在英國爾布爾可勒時，他的父親Sir Robert de Bulkeley25歲，母親Lady Jane le Boteler35歲。他於1265年與Maud Davenport在英國爾達文波特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1307年之後在英國爾伊頓。

zh-hans.Bulkeley, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾布爾可勒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord William Bulkeley于1240年出生在英国爾布爾可勒时，他的父亲Sir Robert de Bulkeley25岁，母亲Lady Jane le Boteler35岁。他于1265年与Maud Davenport在英国爾達文波特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1307年之后在英国爾伊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William Bulkeley was born in 1240, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Robert de Bulkeley, was 25 and his mother, Lady Jane le Boteler, was 35. He married Maud Davenport in 1265, in Davenport, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died after 1307, in Eaton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William Bulkeley est né en 1240, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Bulkeley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane le Boteler, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Maud Davenport en 1265, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé après 1307, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William Bulkeley 1240 in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Bulkeley 25 und seine Mutter Lady Jane le Boteler 35. Er hat 1265 in Davenport, Cheshire, England Maud Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb nach 1307 in Eaton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William Bulkeley è nato il nel 1240 nel Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert de Bulkeley, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane le Boteler, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Maud Davenport nel 1265, nel Davenport, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì dopo il 1307, nel Eaton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord William Bulkeleyが1240年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Bulkeleyは25歳，母Lady Jane le Botelerは35歳であった。1265年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトでMaud Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1307年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアエアトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord William Bulkeley(이)가 1240년 영국 체실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Bulkeley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane le Boteler(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1265년 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 Maud Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1307년 이후 영국 체실르 이턴에서 사망했다.

mn.Bulkeley, Cheshire, England: Bulkeley, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William Bulkeley nasceu em 1240, em Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Bulkeley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane le Boteler, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Davenport em 1265, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1307, em Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William Bulkeley родился в 1240 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Bulkeley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane le Boteler, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Davenport в 1265 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер после 1307 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord William Bulkeley nació en 1240, en Bulkeley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Bulkeley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Jane le Boteler, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Maud Davenport en 1265, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió después de 1307, en Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
